ddls:
CREATE TABLE "vehicles" (
  "vehicle_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each vehicle */,
  "vehicle_type" TEXT /* Type of vehicle (e.g., bus, tram) */,
  "registration_number" TEXT /* Registration number of the vehicle */,
  "make" TEXT /* Make of the vehicle */,
  "model" TEXT /* Model of the vehicle */,
  "year_of_manufacture" INTEGER /* Year the vehicle was manufactured */,
  "capacity" INTEGER /* Passenger capacity of the vehicle */,
  "status" TEXT /* Current status of the vehicle (e.g., active, maintenance, retired) */,
  "fuel_type" TEXT /* Type of fuel used by the vehicle */,
  "last_maintenance_date" TEXT /* Date of the last maintenance activity */,
  "next_maintenance_date" TEXT /* Date of the next scheduled maintenance */,
  "odometer_reading" INTEGER /* Current odometer reading of the vehicle */,
  "service_history" TEXT /* Brief history of major service activities */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("vehicle_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "routes" (
  "route_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each route */,
  "route_name" TEXT /* Name of the route */,
  "start_point" TEXT /* Starting point of the route */,
  "end_point" TEXT /* Ending point of the route */,
  "distance_km" REAL /* Total distance of the route in kilometers */,
  "estimated_duration_minutes" INTEGER /* Estimated duration of the route in minutes */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the route */,
  "frequency_minutes" INTEGER /* Frequency of the route in minutes */,
  "peak_hours" TEXT /* Peak hours for the route */,
  "off_peak_hours" TEXT /* Off-peak hours for the route */,
  "average_passenger_count" INTEGER /* Average number of passengers on the route */,
  "route_type" TEXT /* Type of route (e.g., regular, express) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("route_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "vehicle_movements" (
  "movement_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each movement event */,
  "vehicle_id" INTEGER /* ID of the vehicle */,
  "route_id" INTEGER /* ID of the route the vehicle is on */,
  "datetime" TEXT /* Timestamp of the movement event */,
  "longitude" REAL /* Longitude coordinate of the vehicle */,
  "latitude" REAL /* Latitude coordinate of the vehicle */,
  "on_route" INTEGER /* Boolean indicating if the vehicle is on the route (1 for on route, 0 for off route) */,
  "speed_kmph" REAL /* Speed of the vehicle in kilometers per hour */,
  "fuel_consumption_liter_per_km" REAL /* Fuel consumption of the vehicle */,
  "passenger_count" INTEGER /* Number of passengers in the vehicle */,
  "driver_id" INTEGER /* ID of the driver */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("movement_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_vehicle_movements_vehicle_id FOREIGN KEY ("vehicle_id") REFERENCES vehicles ("vehicle_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_vehicle_movements_driver_id FOREIGN KEY ("driver_id") REFERENCES drivers ("driver_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_vehicle_movements_route_id FOREIGN KEY ("route_id") REFERENCES routes ("route_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "vehicle_maintenance" (
  "maintenance_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each maintenance activity */,
  "vehicle_id" INTEGER /* ID of the vehicle */,
  "maintenance_date" TEXT /* Date the maintenance was performed */,
  "maintenance_type" TEXT /* Type of maintenance (e.g., routine, repair) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the maintenance activity */,
  "cost" REAL /* Cost of the maintenance activity */,
  "mechanic_id" INTEGER /* ID of the mechanic who performed the maintenance */,
  "next_maintenance_due" TEXT /* Date when the next maintenance is due */,
  "maintenance_status" TEXT /* Status of the maintenance (e.g., completed, pending) */,
  "service_interval_km" INTEGER /* Service interval in kilometers */,
  "service_interval_months" INTEGER /* Service interval in months */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("maintenance_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_vehicle_maintenance_vehicle_id FOREIGN KEY ("vehicle_id") REFERENCES vehicles ("vehicle_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_vehicle_maintenance_mechanic_id FOREIGN KEY ("mechanic_id") REFERENCES mechanics ("mechanic_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "mechanics" (
  "mechanic_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each mechanic */,
  "mechanic_name" TEXT /* Full name of the mechanic */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the mechanic */,
  "phone" TEXT /* Phone number of the mechanic */,
  "specialization" TEXT /* Specialization of the mechanic (e.g., electrical, mechanical) */,
  "experience_years" INTEGER /* Number of years of experience the mechanic has */,
  "certifications" TEXT /* List of certifications the mechanic holds */,
  "availability_status" TEXT /* Current availability status of the mechanic (e.g., available, on leave) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("mechanic_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "drivers" (
  "driver_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each driver */,
  "driver_name" TEXT /* Full name of the driver */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the driver */,
  "phone" TEXT /* Phone number of the driver */,
  "license_number" TEXT /* Driver's license number */,
  "vehicle_id" INTEGER /* ID of the vehicle assigned to the driver */,
  "experience_years" INTEGER /* Number of years of driving experience */,
  "driver_status" TEXT /* Current status of the driver (e.g., active, on leave) */,
  "hours_worked_week" INTEGER /* Number of hours the driver has worked in the current week */,
  "safety_rating" REAL /* Driver's safety rating */,
  "route_id" INTEGER /* ID of the route assigned to the driver */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("driver_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_drivers_route_id FOREIGN KEY ("route_id") REFERENCES routes ("route_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_drivers_vehicle_id FOREIGN KEY ("vehicle_id") REFERENCES vehicles ("vehicle_id")
)
